message:
fix(coding-agent): detect image MIME via file-type (#205)

Co-authored-by: Mario Zechner <badlogicgames@gmail.com>

 ## [Unreleased]
 
+### Fixed
+
+- Detect image MIME type via file magic (read tool and `@file` attachments), not filename extension.
+
 ## [0.23.1] - 2025-12-17
 
 ### Fixed
